rule: Panel size must be between 10 and 20 events.
reason: Keeps manual verification feasible while avoiding one-event anecdotes.

rule: At least 30 percent of rows must be non-success or unresolved if such events are available.
No row can be admissible without pre-event proof dated before the event date.
Discovery source alone is never enough for admissibility.
reason: Prevents treating public calendars as PIT evidence.

rule: Rows with only month/quarter date precision can be included only as exploratory_only.
Issuer press release SEC filing or archived snapshot is preferred over third-party calendar text.
reason: Anchors the event date to a timestamped source.

rule: No return calculation is allowed in the panel-building run.
reason: Separates data construction from strategy evaluation.

rule: No promotion is allowed from this panel without a later coverage-completeness gate.
reason: Protects against manually curated panel bias.
